quote_en: I flew to Beijing for an executive health check-up and YuanU handled the entire coordination. They booked my slots at BFH-IMD well in advance and built a tight two-day itinerary around my meetings. A dedicated interpreter sat with me throughout the examination, explaining each step in clear English. Airport pickup and hotel arrangements were ready on arrival, no waiting, no confusion. Invoices were issued promptly for reimbursement back home. It felt like a business trip, not a hospital visit — which is exactly what I wanted.
quote_zh: 我飞来北京做体检，YuanU 全程协调。BFH-IMD 的预约早已安排妥当，行程紧凑配合商务会议，陪同翻译全程讲解，接机和酒店也都到位，发票开具及时高效。

quote_en: As a retired teacher exploring options for cataract surgery, I was nervous about navigating a Beijing hospital in English. YuanU's team made the process remarkably straightforward. They scheduled my pre-operative consultation at BFH-IMD, arranged a three-night stay near the clinic, and organised every transfer from the airport. During my appointment, the interpreter explained what the ophthalmologist was proposing — and translated every question I raised. Nothing felt rushed. I left with all the information I needed to make an informed decision at home.
quote_zh: 作为一位退休教师来京咨询白内障手术，我起初对语言沟通颇有顾虑。YuanU 帮我安排 BFH-IMD 的术前咨询、住宿与全程接送，口译细致到位，让我得以安心回家再做决定。

quote_en: I was researching dental implant options across Europe when a colleague mentioned Beijing. I contacted YuanU for a feasibility assessment. Within a week they had organised a consultation at BFH-IMD and sent me a clear breakdown: appointment times, hotel recommendations within walking distance, and estimated costs in writing. The on-site interpreter translated the dental plan in detail, including the timelines and materials discussed. I returned to Warsaw with notes, not promises — and a shortlist of options to discuss with my local dentist.
quote_zh: 我在欧洲对比种植牙方案时了解到北京。YuanU 一周内安排 BFH-IMD 面诊，并提供行程、住宿、费用明细。口译详尽翻译了治疗计划与材料选项，我带着清晰笔记回华沙与当地牙医继续讨论。

quote_en: I teach yoga in Oregon and have long been curious about TCM from a practitioner's perspective. YuanU arranged a consultation at BFH-IMD that fit around a two-week trip I was already planning through Asia. The interpreter didn't just translate — she contextualised. When the TCM practitioner spoke about meridians and patterns, the interpreter helped me understand the framework rather than just the vocabulary. YuanU also handled hotel booking near the hospital and airport transfers. I returned home with a notebook full of observations worth exploring further.
quote_zh: 我是瑜伽老师，对中医向往已久。YuanU 安排我在 BFH-IMD 的问诊，翻译不仅传话，更帮助我理解中医的理论框架；住宿与接送一并安排妥当，此行收获颇丰。

quote_en: I was exploring knee rehabilitation options after a sports injury and wanted a second opinion from a specialist at a Beijing teaching hospital. YuanU coordinated a consultation at BFH-IMD and reshuffled my itinerary twice when work meetings shifted — always responsive, never pushy. The on-site interpreter was familiar with orthopaedic terminology, which made the specialist's explanations accessible. Ground transfers, hotel, and invoicing were all managed on their end. As someone who plans projects for a living, I appreciated how smoothly this one ran on theirs.
quote_zh: 我因运动损伤来北京咨询膝关节康复方案。YuanU 协调 BFH-IMD 面诊，两次因工作调整行程都从容应对。陪同口译熟悉骨科术语，接送、住宿与开票全程无忧，整体组织专业可靠。
